title: aquilegia ballii
intro: Aquilegia ballii is a species of flowering plant in the genus Aquilegia, commonly known as the ball's columbine. It is a perennial plant native to the western United States, known for its bell-shaped flowers and delicate foliage. Aquilegia ballii has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to promote wound healing and provide relief from skin conditions and digestive issues.
